name: General-purpose assistant (Qwen 2.5 3B)
task: Follow instructions across reasoning, summarization, code, math, and structured output. The smallest Qwen that holds JSON-schema compliance under load. Quantized to int4 for laptop-class deployment.
verifier: On a 200-row holdout: JSON-schema compliance >= 0.95, instruction-followed >= 0.90 (judged), token-overrun rate < 0.02, refusal rate on benign prompts < 0.01.
notes: 3B is the smallest base that holds JSON-schema compliance at >0.95 after light fine-tune. Larger seeds set (5-10k diverse examples) recommended for production; 50 seeds here is a smoke-test starter. Pair with `kolm export --format gguf-q4_k_m` after training for laptop deployment.
